query:
INSERT INTO cala_cumulative_effective_balances (
              journal_id, account_id, currency, effective, version,
              all_time_version, latest_entry_id, updated_at, created_at, values
            )
            SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
                $1::uuid[],
                $2::uuid[],
                $3::text[],
                $4::date[],
                $5::integer[],
                $6::integer[],
                $7::uuid[],
                $8::timestamptz[],
                $9::timestamptz[],
                $10::jsonb[]
            )
